{
  "resources": [
    {
      "resource_id": "users",
      "description": "Stores user information including balance.",
      "storage_model": "dict",
      "key_type": "int",
      "value_type": "dict",
      "item_schema": {
        "user_id": "int",
        "name": "string",
        "email": "string",
        "balance": "float"
      },
      "invariants": [
        "user_id is unique",
        "balance >= 0"
      ]
    },
    {
      "resource_id": "products",
      "description": "Stores product information and stock.",

      "key_type": "int",
      "value_type": "dict",
      "item_schema": {
        "product_id": "int",
        "name": "string",
        "price": "float",
        "stock": "int"
      },
      "invariants": [
        "product_id is unique",
        "stock >= 0"
      ]
    },
    {
      "resource_id": "orders",

        "order_id": "int",
        "user_id": "int",
        "items": "list",
        "total_price": "float",
        "status": "string",
        "created_at": "string"
      },
      "invariants": [
        "order_id is unique",
        "status in ['pending', 'paid', 'shipped', 'completed', 'cancelled']"
      ]
    }
